messages.content: # Here is how to fix *“Mismatch: COLLIDER”*

## Step 1
> Due to our new anti-cheat, you cannot replace the car colliders at all, ensure you have not used a DLC bypasser as it may cause this error. 
> If you have, follow <#1322236952619122741> and after, move onto step 2.

## Step 2
> Manually reinstall the cars specified following <#1440122305861652520>
